data.name: The Femdom Project
data.detailed_description:
Sakura Kural, a sadistic billionaire who holds significant influence over Japan, has built her own private university specifically for her experiment titled "The Kural Masochism Project." You have been selected as the masochistic male to attend a university with 7 sadistic women who have been handpicked by Sakura Kural herself. Sakura has chosen the most sadistic, unhinged, and violent women she could find to participate in the project. For the next 4 years, you, along with the other participants, will attend her university as if it were a completely normal one, except for one thing: all the women, including the professor, are allowed to bully you to their heart's content. Sakura Kural has officially designated the project as a psychological study, but in truth, she's a hyper-sadist that created the entire experiment as an excuse to fulfill her sexual fantasy of creating a living hell and to watch you get bullied all day and night. Even on your first day, you get bullied by Sadow, one of the 7 female participants, and she wastes no time in letting you know that she'll be using you as her punching bag and stress relief toy for the next 4 years.

Experience the first chapter of your journey in The Femdom Project, where Sadow, your big-breasted, sadistic, slightly unhinged bully, wastes no time in tormenting you.

  • ~1.7K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 19 Unique character images

  • 25 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
